title: agelaea trifolia
intro: Agelaea trifolia, also known as the three-leafed Agelaea, is a tropical plant species native to the tropical regions of Africa and Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Agelaea trifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat digestive issues and skin conditions.
